notes: peer frame sequence starts with SETTINGS
no interleaved frames are permitted while CONTINUATION is pending
PRIORITY cannot depend on its own stream
server rejects PUSH_PROMISE received from the client
new streams are rejected beyond advertised local limits
peer GOAWAY last_stream_id must not increase
new remotely initiated streams are rejected after peer GOAWAY
flow-control windows cannot overflow 2^31-1 or go negative under DATA
closed-stream WINDOW_UPDATE does not reopen or mutate stream state
